zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Wakebridge II於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Nicholas de Wakebridge22歲，母親Julianna Fitz Ralph22歲。他於大約1320年與Joanne De Aslaccon在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年8月5日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Wakebridge II于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，他的父亲Nicholas de Wakebridge22岁，母亲Julianna Fitz Ralph22岁。他于大约1320年与Joanne De Aslaccon在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年8月5日在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Wakebridge II was born about 1280, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Wakebridge, was 22 and his mother, Julianna Fitz Ralph, was 22. He married Joanne De Aslaccon about 1320, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 5 August 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Wakebridge II est né environ 1280, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Wakebridge, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Julianna Fitz Ralph, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joanne De Aslaccon environ 1320, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 août 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Wakebridge II um 1280 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Wakebridge 22 und seine Mutter Julianna Fitz Ralph 22. Er hat um 1320 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Joanne De Aslaccon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 5. August 1349 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Wakebridge II è nato il circa 1280 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Wakebridge, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Julianna Fitz Ralph, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joanne De Aslaccon circa 1320, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 agosto 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Wakebridge IIが約1280年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Wakebridgeは22歳，母Julianna Fitz Ralphは22歳であった。約1320年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでJoanne De Aslacconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年8月5日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Wakebridge II(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Wakebridge(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianna Fitz Ralph(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Joanne De Aslaccon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 8월 5일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Wakebridge II nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Wakebridge, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Julianna Fitz Ralph, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne De Aslaccon aproximadamente 1320, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Wakebridge II родился около 1280 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Wakebridge было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Julianna Fitz Ralph, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne De Aslaccon около 1320 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 августа 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Wakebridge II nació aproximadamente 1280, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas de Wakebridge, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Julianna Fitz Ralph, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joanne De Aslaccon aproximadamente 1320, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
